name: zrndr_fog_color_set_rgb01_clamped
description: zRndr::FogColor_SetRgb01Clamped clamps RGB inputs, updates fog color state, forwards hardware fog color, and repacks 16-bit fog color masks.
known_limits: VC5SP3 11.00.7022 /O2 /Ob0 /Zp4 COFF byte compare currently fails for zRndr::FogColor_SetRgb01Clamped by 1 unmasked byte after masking 132 relocation bytes; Binary Ninja body is 355 bytes and the VC object body is 368 bytes with 13 trailing VC NOPs trimmed.
The reviewed byte drift is a single instruction-level difference after relocation masking; the native smoke verifies RGB clamping, hardware fog color forwarding, and 16-bit fog color packing.
